name: Task Decomposition
prompt_template:
Decompose project brief into epics, stories, tasks:
{brief}

name: Conflict Resolution
Sprint Planning
Standup Synthesis
Risk Forecasting
Market Research
prompt_template: Conduct market research on: {topic}. Identify competitors, feature gaps, opportunities.

name: Wireframe Generation
prompt_template: Generate low-fidelity wireframes (markdown/ascii) for: {feature}.

name: User Persona Synthesis
prompt_template: Build 3-5 user personas for: {product}. Include goals, pains, jobs-to-be-done.

name: Competitor Deep-Dive
prompt_template: Deep competitor analysis for: {space}. Cover features, pricing, positioning, weaknesses.

name: Pricing Strategy
prompt_template:
Recommend pricing model for: {product} given competitors:
{competitors}

name: Brand Identity Brief
prompt_template: Draft brand identity (voice, palette, typography) for: {product}

name: Tech Stack Selection
prompt_template:
Given requirements: {requirements}
Select optimal stack and justify.

name: API Contract Design
prompt_template: Design REST/GraphQL contracts for: {feature}. Output OpenAPI-style schema.

name: Database Modeling
prompt_template: Design ERD for: {domain}. Include tables, columns, relationships, indexes.

name: System Diagram
prompt_template: Produce a C4-level system diagram (mermaid) for: {system}

name: Microservices Decomposition
prompt_template:
Decompose monolith into services with bounded contexts:
{domain}

name: Event Schema Design
prompt_template: Design event-driven schema (Kafka/SNS) for: {flow}

name: Caching Strategy
prompt_template: Recommend caching layers (Redis/CDN/HTTP) for: {workload}

name: Performance Budget
prompt_template: Define performance budgets (latency, throughput, bundle size) for: {app}

name: Code Review
prompt_template:
Review the following code for quality, security, performance:
{code}

name: OWASP Audit
prompt_template:
Audit code against OWASP Top 10:
{code}

name: Dependency Audit
prompt_template:
Scan dependencies for CVEs and outdated versions:
{lockfile}

name: Secret Scanning
prompt_template:
Find leaked secrets, API keys, credentials in:
{diff}

name: License Compliance
prompt_template:
Check license compatibility for dependencies:
{deps}

name: Threat Modeling
prompt_template:
STRIDE threat model for: {system}
Identify attack vectors + mitigations.

name: Performance Review
prompt_template:
Identify performance bottlenecks (N+1, hot loops, blocking I/O) in:
{code}

name: REST API Implementation
prompt_template:
Implement {framework} endpoint(s) per spec:
{spec}

name: Database Migration
prompt_template:
Generate migration for schema:
{schema}

name: GraphQL Resolver
prompt_template:
Implement GraphQL resolvers for schema:
{schema}

name: WebSocket Handler
prompt_template: Implement WebSocket handler for real-time {feature}

name: Background Job
prompt_template: Implement background worker (Celery/BullMQ) for: {task}

name: Auth Middleware
prompt_template:
Implement {scheme} auth middleware (JWT/OAuth/session) per spec:
{spec}

name: Rate Limiting
prompt_template:
Add rate limiting to endpoint(s) per policy:
{policy}

name: Caching Layer
prompt_template: Add Redis cache layer for: {hot_path}

name: React Component
prompt_template:
Build a React component matching wireframe:
{wireframe}

name: Responsive Layout
prompt_template: Build responsive layout for: {screen}. Tailwind preferred.

name: State Management
prompt_template: Set up Zustand/Redux store for: {domain}

name: Form Validation
prompt_template: Build validated form (zod/yup) for: {fields}

name: Animation Choreography
prompt_template: Design micro-interactions for: {ui_state} using Framer Motion or CSS

name: Accessibility Wiring
prompt_template: Add ARIA labels, keyboard nav, focus rings to: {component}

name: Theme System
prompt_template: Implement dark/light theme tokens for: {design_system}

name: Mobile-First Refactor
prompt_template: Refactor desktop UI to mobile-first responsive: {ui}

name: Exploratory Testing
prompt_template: Generate exploratory test scenarios + edge cases for: {feature}

name: Accessibility Check
prompt_template:
WCAG audit of UI:
{ui}

name: Cross-Browser Validation
prompt_template:
Identify cross-browser concerns for:
{ui}

name: Visual Regression
prompt_template: Define visual regression test points (Percy/Chromatic) for: {ui}

name: API Smoke Test
prompt_template: Generate smoke test suite for endpoints: {endpoints}

name: Load Test Plan
prompt_template: Design k6/locust load test plan for: {target_load}

name: Penetration Probe
prompt_template: Identify pen-test vectors against: {endpoint}

name: Unit Test Generation
prompt_template:
Generate unit tests with high coverage for:
{code}

name: CI Pipeline Config
prompt_template: Generate GitHub Actions workflow for: {project_type}

name: E2E Playwright
prompt_template:
Author Playwright E2E tests for user flow:
{flow}

name: Integration Test
prompt_template: Write integration tests covering DB+API for: {feature}

name: Mutation Testing
prompt_template: Configure mutation testing (Stryker) for module: {module}

name: Coverage Gate
prompt_template: Add coverage gate to CI requiring {threshold}% for project: {project}

name: Snapshot Tests
prompt_template: Generate component snapshot tests for: {components}

name: Root Cause Analysis
Patch Generation
Stack Trace Diagnosis
Hotfix Authoring
prompt_template:
Write minimal hotfix for production incident:
{incident}

name: Rollback Strategy
prompt_template:
Design safe rollback for failed deployment:
{change}

name: Memory Leak Hunt
Release Notes
prompt_template:
Author user-facing release notes from changelog:
{changes}

name: Changelog Generation
prompt_template:
Generate keep-a-changelog formatted entry from commits:
{commits}

name: Deployment Manifest
prompt_template: Produce Kubernetes/Docker Compose manifest for service: {service}

name: Customer Announcement
prompt_template: Draft customer email announcing: {feature}

name: Slack/Discord Broadcast
prompt_template: Compose internal Slack announcement for: {milestone}

name: PR Description
prompt_template:
Write PR description (summary, motivation, test plan) from diff:
{diff}
